'''Arthur Romano''' (born 17 August 1997) is a French professional [[rugby league]] footballer who plays as a {{rlp|wg}}er or {{rlp|ce}} for [[Hull FC]] in the [[Super League]] and [[France national rugby league team|France]] at international level.

He has previously played for [[Saint-Esteve XIII Catalan|Saint-Esteve]] in the [[Elite One Championship]]. Romano has spent time on loan from [[Catalans Dragons|Catalans]] at [[Toulouse Olympique]] in the [[RFL Championship|Championship]].

==Background==
Romano was born in [[Carpentras]], [[Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur]], [[France]].

==Career==
===Catalans Dragons===
In 2017 he made his [[Catalans Dragons|Catalans]] debut in the [[Challenge Cup]] against [[Hull F.C.|Hull FC]].<ref name="Challenge Cup: Hull FC 62-0 Catalans Dragons">{{cite web|url=https://www.bbc.co.uk/sport/rugby-league/39862991|title=Challenge Cup: Hull FC 62-0 Catalans Dragons|publisher=BBC|date=12 May 2017|accessdate=13 May 2017}}</ref> He made his Super League appearance on May 29, 2017, also against [[Hull F.C.|Hull FC]].

===Hull FC===
On 29 September 2025 he signed for [[Hull FC]] in the [[Super League]] on a 2-year deal.<ref>{{cite web|website=Love Rugby League|date=29 Sep 2025|author=Louis Chapman Coombe|title=Hull FC make seventh signing for 2026 as latest recruit’s contract length confirmed|url=https://www.loverugbyleague.com/post/hull-fc-make-seventh-signing-for-2026-as-contract-length-for-latest-recruit-confirmed}}</ref>

==International career==
He was selected in France 9s squad for the [[2019 Rugby League World Cup 9s]].<ref>{{cite web|date=2 October 2019|title=La liste des joueurs pour la Coupe du Monde dévoilée!|url=https://www.ffr13.fr/actualite-a-la-une/la-liste-des-joueurs-pour-la-coupe-du-monde-devoilee/|publisher=FFRXIII|accessdate=1 November 2019|language=French}}</ref><ref>{{cite web|date=10 October 2019|title=XIII de France: Romain Puso remplace Lilian Albert, forfait!|url=https://www.ffr13.fr/actualite-a-la-une/xiii-de-france-romain-puso-remplace-lilian-albert-forfait/|publisher=FFR XIII|accessdate=1 November 2019|language=French}}</ref>
